---
name: Structure suggestion
about: Propose a change or addition to the folder structure or documentation
title: "[structure] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you proposing?

A clear, one-sentence description of the change.

## Why?

What problem does this solve? What brands/teams would benefit?

## Who does NOT benefit?

Be honest — every addition is noise for the brands that don't need it. Who would this make the template worse for?

## Proposed change

- Folder(s) affected:
- New files:
- Removed files:
- Documentation changes:

## Have you tried it on a real brand?

If yes, link the fork so we can see it in context.
